name: oway-dispatch-console
description: Carrier dispatch console for Oway take-home — manage shipments, assign to vehicles, generate routes

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @oway/api" "npm run dev -w @oway/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @oway/shared && npm run build -w @oway/api && npm run build -w @oway/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @oway/shared && npm run typecheck -w @oway/api && npm run typecheck -w @oway/web
